description: An engineer must track the weight of every component added to an aircraft during assembly to ensure the final weight and center of gravity are within limits.

nodes.task_description: For each part installed, retrieve its official weight from the parts database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the correct weight for each component.

nodes.task_description: Add the part's weight and its location (moment arm) to the aircraft's master weight and balance sheet.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately updates the master sheet.

nodes.task_description: Continuously recalculate the aircraft's total weight and center of gravity to ensure it remains within the design envelope.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's calculations show the current center of gravity is within acceptable limits.
